violations.text: The (walls ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed tiles detaching from wall behind the oven. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the (ware washing area ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The floors throughout the facility and the ice machine airgap have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or black biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and knife) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC brought to dish sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Various items (veggie puree, ground and pureed hot dog, mashed potatoes) were observed held between 63-97 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Various items were observed held between 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded and called for service for the walk-in during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The doors to the outside, located near the dishwashing AND back storage areas, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2025
Blender was observed with water residue and not stored inverted. PIC informed to air-dry equipment and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the back storage area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The following areas are in poor repair: -floor in the back storage was observed with cracks and lacking sealed cement, -wall/window ledge behind prep sink was observed with gaps. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Cut ham and vegetables was observed held at (47-49) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The refrigerator in kitchenette located in the (on floor 1 and 2 ) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures were 47-49DF.PIC informed. Facility not allowed to store any TCS products in units. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The floors in the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
